company.name: Les Laboratoires VITAL
company.specialization: Phytotherapy, natural supplements, wellness, and cosmetology

company_overview.description: Vital is a pharmaceutical laboratory founded in 2000 in Tunisia, specializing in phytotherapy, natural wellness solutions, and cosmetology.
company_overview.key_claim: Africa's leading manufacturer of natural plant-based dietary supplements
company_overview.expertise: 20 years of transforming plants into effective health solutions through science, controlled sourcing, and perfect safety
company_overview.mission: Engaged commitment to healthcare professionals and patients to offer high-quality natural products

headquarters.address: Z.I Ben Arous – Route Mornag – Ben Arous, Tunisia

laboratories.name: Manufacturing Laboratories
laboratories.location: Avenue Bahri – Boumhel – Ben Arous, Tunisia

certifications_and_standards.ISO_9001: Quality management system for dietary supplements
certifications_and_standards.ISO_22000: Food safety management system for dietary supplements
certifications_and_standards.ISO_22716: Good manufacturing practices for cosmetic products
certifications_and_standards.quality_commitment: Vital follows rigorous standards ensuring conformity with Tunisian norms and international laws

company_statistics.market_position: 1 out of 3 prescriptions in Tunisia contains a Vital product
company_statistics.export_presence: Commercialized in multiple countries including Morocco, Poland, France, Congo, Ivory Coast, and more

featured_products.fersang: Tunisia's second therapeutic alternative for iron treatment
featured_products.apitou: First therapeutic alternative for treating children's cough
featured_products.supplements: 70% of Vital's dietary supplements are targeted at specific populations: babies & children, pregnant/nursing women, seniors, athletes, weight loss seekers

quality_assurance.process: Each product undergoes rigorous analysis by accredited laboratories (VERITAS) with certification reports and compliance verification
quality_assurance.cvl: Free Sales Certificate (CVL) obtained from competent authorities following conformity verification
quality_assurance.international: Vital's products are homologated in multiple countries: Morocco, Poland, France, Congo, Ivory Coast, and more
quality_assurance.standards: Manufacturing follows strictest standards combining science, controlled origins, and perfect safety

company_achievements.2003: Creation of first capsule production site and launch of first phytotherapy supplement (Royal Jelly)
company_achievements.2004: Became Tunisia's first specialized local producer of phytotherapy dietary supplements
company_achievements.2009: Launch of new forms: semi-liquid, sachets, syrups, soaps
company_achievements.2020: ISO 22716 certification for cosmetics manufacturing & Celebrated 20 years of natural health solutions

raw_materials.sourcing: Carefully selected suppliers providing quality raw materials
raw_materials.focus: Plant-based ingredients with standardized and well-documented properties
raw_materials.quality: All ingredients are labeled, standardized, and well-documented according to recommendations

target_audience.healthcare_professionals: Doctors trust Vital across various specialties
target_audience.training: Pioneer in medical continuous training in phytotherapy
target_audience.patients: All age groups seeking natural health solutions
target_audience.specific_groups: Babies, children, pregnant/nursing women, seniors, athletes, people wanting to lose weight

key_messages_for_chatbot.company_identity: We are Tunisia's leading pharmaceutical laboratory specializing in natural phytotherapy solutions with 20 years of expertise
key_messages_for_chatbot.product_philosophy: We transform plants into effective health solutions using science, controlled sourcing, and perfect safety standards
key_messages_for_chatbot.quality_promise: Every product meets international certifications (ISO 9001, ISO 22000, ISO 22716) and Halal standards
key_messages_for_chatbot.market_trust: 1 out of 3 prescriptions in Tunisia contains a Vital product, showing doctors and patients trust our solutions
key_messages_for_chatbot.natural_approach: All our supplements are 100% natural without harmful side effects, suitable for all age groups
key_messages_for_chatbot.availability: Over 500 products available for various health needs, commercialized in Tunisia and internationally
key_messages_for_chatbot.innovation: Continuous development of new pharmaceutical forms (capsules, syrups, creams, soaps) to meet diverse patient needs
